The Science

Motion
Is The
Message.

Neuroscience confirms: motion activates the superior colliculus — the brain's reflex center — before conscious awareness. Your audience's gaze snaps to our displays involuntarily, on every pass. This is not a marketing claim. It is a physiological fact.

Static billboards fade into the urban environment. AOTC moves through the exact corridors where your audience spends money — triggering the attention reflex, repeatedly, with documented intent.

►
Involuntary Attention CaptureMotion targets superior colliculus before conscious thought — Vision Research, 2020
►
2× Higher Ad RecallDigital motion displays outperform static formats by 100%+ — OAAA / Nielsen
►
4× More ObservedDigital OOH screens generate 4× the engagement of conventional formats
►
90-Second Brand Judgment62–90% of brand impressions are color-and-visual, formed in 90 sec — Singh, 2006

Campaign Options

Choose
Your
Campaign.

Route-engineered. Performance-optimized. Guaranteed. Routes are claimed on a rolling basis.

01 — One Day↗

Daily Sprint

1-Day Deployment

Precision, high-visibility deployment during peak buying hours. Built for launches, promotions, and time-critical events.

02 — Three Days↗

Daily Bunch

3 Consecutive Days

Three consecutive days crosses the repetition threshold for brand recall. Exposure frequency is the primary driver of consumer action.

03 — Seven Days↗

Weekly Special

7-Day Campaign

A week of consistent presence builds credibility, recognition, and competitive pressure in your target zone.

04 — Thirty Days↗

Monthly Special

Full-Month Routing

A strategic routing plan to saturate key corridors and condition your market for long-term recall.

05 — Elite↗

Exclusive

Dedicated Monthly

One truck. Your brand only. No shared rotations. No competitor adjacency. Total territorial presence.

06 — Long-Term↗

Extended Campaign

60+ Days

Compounding brand recognition and lasting market authority. Advertising as infrastructure.

How We Operate

Built On
Discipline.

01

Plan With Purpose

A clear path aligned with your goals, budget, and timeline. Defined deliverables. No vague objectives.

02

Collaborate Openly

Communication stays clear and consistent. You know exactly where your campaign stands — every day.

03

Adapt Strategically

No two brands are identical. We adjust routes, timing, and creative as your campaign runs.

04

Deliver With Discipline

Structure, accountability, and genuine care in every campaign. How we do anything is how we do everything.

Our Story

Small Team.
Big Ideas.

AOTC was not built in a boardroom. It was built by a team that values discipline, execution, and intentional growth — forged as students and athletes in Chicago.

The classroom sharpened discipline of thought. Athletics reinforced discipline of action. That same structure guides every campaign we launch today.

"How you do anything is how you do everything."

01Plan With PurposeGoals define direction
02Collaborate OpenlyTotal transparency
03Adapt StrategicallyFlexibility is strength
04Deliver With DisciplineResults over promises
